texto: For as long as I care to remember, religion, like the striptease, has always been a display of the power of suggestion. Like the Virgin Birth, it has all too often supported an immaculate deception.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Bernard Katz: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a fe. O trecho “For as long as I care to remember, religion, like the striptease, has always been a display of th…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que fe, power, long pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de long e remember.
